ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ankitpokhrel/jira-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ankitpokhrel/jira-cli
Language: go
🔥 Feature-rich interactive Jira command line.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cli/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cli/cli
Language: go
GitHub’s official command line tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: evanw/esbuild
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evanw/esbuild
Language: go
An extremely fast bundler for the web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gin-gonic/gin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gin-gonic/gin
Language: go
Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: goharbor/harbor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/goharbor/harbor
Language: go
An open source trusted cloud native registry project that stores, signs, and scans content.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grpc/grpc-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go
Language: go
The Go language implementation of gRPC. HTTP/2 based RPC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harness/harness
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harness/harness
Language: go
Harness Open Source is an end-to-end developer platform with Source Control Management, CI/CD Pipelines, Hosted Developer Environments, and Artifact Registries.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform
Language: go
Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jesseduffield/lazygit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit
Language: go
simple terminal UI for git commands

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nats-io/nats-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server
Language: go
High-Performance server for NATS.io, the cloud and edge native messaging system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netbirdio/netbird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird
Language: go
Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pingcap/tidb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb
Language: go
TiDB - the open-source, cloud-native, distributed SQL database designed for modern applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rapidaai/voice-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rapidaai/voice-ai
Language: go
Rapida is an open-source, end-to-end voice AI orchestration platform for building real-time conversational voice agents with audio streaming, STT, TTS, VAD, multi-channel integration, agent state management, and observability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: spf13/viper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/spf13/viper
Language: go
Go configuration with fangs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: traefik/traefik
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/traefik/traefik
Language: go
The Cloud Native Application Proxy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vxcontrol/pentagi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vxcontrol/pentagi
Language: go
Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xdevplatform/xurl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xdevplatform/xurl
Language: go
